identity.name: Nassib
identity.description: Modern Restaurant Management System for Comoros
identity.emotional_archetype: Modern Island Hospitality - Efficient, Warm, Sophisticated

primary.name: Comoros Rose
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Active States, Notification Badges

waiter_mobile.structure: Bottom Navigation, Large Hit Areas (min 44px), Swipe Actions

kitchen_display.structure: Masonry or Grid, Large Fonts for readability from distance

buttons.primary: bg-rose-600 text-white hover:bg-rose-700 shadow-none font-semibold rounded-md

cards.style: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 text-slate-50 p-6 rounded-md

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Hybrid Theme': Dark mode for Waiters/Admin, High-Contrast Light Mode option for Kitchen Display.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, distinct look.
For the background, use a very subtle 'Chiromani' inspired grid pattern (defined in visual_enhancers) on the Dashboard backgrounds to give a local Comorian touch without being overwhelming.
Ensure all touch targets on the Waiter Mobile view are at least 44px height.
Use the specific image URLs provided for the Menu and Staff sections.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, keep it flat and clean 'Slate-950'.
For charts, use Recharts with the custom color palette defined (Rose, Amber, Emerald).
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for floating elements like the Bottom Nav or Modals.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
